title: Source Packet Schema
description: Schema for source_packet.json — the mechanical markdown AST produced by source_packet.py. Used as input to the deterministic compiler.

source_file.description: Absolute path to the source markdown file.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the full source text for integrity verification.

line_count.description: Total number of lines in the source file.

total_chunks.description: Total number of chunks when chunking is used.

blocks_in_chunk.description: Number of blocks in the current chunk.

blocks.description: Ordered list of typed blocks. Types are MECHANICAL (Markdown syntax patterns only). The LLM decides actual DOCX mapping.

type.description: Mechanical block type — determined by Markdown syntax, NOT semantics.

text.description: Full text content of the block, including leading # for headings.

line_start.description: 1-based line number of the first line of this block.

line_end.description: 1-based line number of the last line of this block (exclusive).
